data.title: Bitcoin open interest falls $10 billion with $100 million in leverage supporting $93k
data.description:
Bitcoin open interest decreased from an all-time high of $71.85 billion on Dec. 18, 2024, to $60.47 billion, a decline of roughly 16%. Bitcoin’s price holds near $96,300 within a monthly range spanning a low of $91,300 to a high of $100,000. Recent Coinglass data indicates a shift in positions across multiple platforms. For instance, […]

data.title: FTX begins repaying customers: first phase of fund distribution underway
data.description:
Customers with claims up to $50,000 will receive refunds in the coming days through BitGo and Kraken.
The post FTX begins repaying customers: first phase of fund distribution underway appeared first on Atlas21.

data.title: Whales bought 150 million XRP in the past 48 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto analyst Ali posted on the X platform that whales bought 150 million XRP in the past 48 hours.

data.title: Glassnode: The total Meme contract holdings have dropped significantly from the peak
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Glassnode posted on the X platform that since reaching a peak in mid-December 2024, the total Meme contract holdings have dropped significantly from the peak, and DOGE's contract holdings (7-day moving average) have fallen by 58.45%, from US$3.58 billion on December 9, 2024 to US$1.49 billion today.

data.title: AscendEX will launch Deer Token (DEER)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Deer Token (DEER) at 19:00 on February 19, opening the DEER/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: The total number of TRON accounts has officially exceeded 290 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News TRONSCAN data shows that the total number of TRON accounts has reached 290,009,802, officially exceeding 290 million. It is reported that the total number of accounts is the total number of account addresses that have been activated on the TRON network.
TRON is committed to building the infrastructure of the decentralized Internet and actively promoting the advent of Internet decentralization. At present, the number of transactions on TRON exceeds 9.65 billion, the total locked volume (TVL) exceeds US$20.8 billion, and the issuance of TRC20-USDT has reached 62.74 billion pieces, making it an important global payment network.
In addition, today TRON also launched a new ecological incubation plan-TRON Builders League (TBL for short), which aims to provide builders with financial support, professional guidance and development opportunities to help the project continue to develop steadily. The fund pool of the plan is as high as US$10 million.

data.title: LBank will list SIREN (SIREN)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch SIREN (SIREN) at 18:30 (SGT) on February 19, and open the SIREN/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 18:30 on February 19, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 19:00 on February 20.

data.title: Binance Launches 9th HODLer Airdrop: Earn KAITO (KAITO) with BNB Holdings!
data.description: Binance HODLer Airdrop is back with its 9th round, rewarding BNB holders with KAITO (KAITO) tokens.Airdrop Details:Subscription Period: Feb 6, 2025 (08:00 ET) – Feb 11, 2025 (07:59 ET)Eligible Users: BNB holders who subscribe to Binance Earn products (Regular or Current)Airdrop Pool: 20,000,000 KAITO (2% of max supply)Circulating Supply Pre-Listing: 241,388,889 KAITO (24.14% of total supply)KAITO Listing on Binance:Trading Opens:  Feb 20, 2025 (21:00 ET8)Trading Pairs: BTC, USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, TRYSeed Tag Trading Rules ApplyHow to Participate:1. Go to Binance’s [Wealth Management] section2. Use BNB to subscribe to Earn Coin products (Regular or Demand Deposits)3. Binance will take random snapshots of BNB holdings4. Receive KAITO tokens in your spot wallet within 24 hours of distribution

data.title: Binance will list KAITO and open trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch KAITO (KAITO) at 13:00 (UTC) on February 20, 2025, and open KAITO/BTC, KAITO/USDT, KAITO/USDC, KAITO/BNB, KAITO/FDUSD and KAITO/TRY trading pairs. In addition, users who deposit BNB into SimpleEarn products between 00:00 (UTC) on February 6, 2025 and 23:59 (UTC) on February 10, 2025 will be eligible for KAITO airdrop rewards. The airdrop tokens will be distributed to the user's spot wallet 1 hour before the start of trading. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Tether Seeks Majority Stake in South American Agribusiness Adecoagro
data.description:
Adecoagro, a leading producer of milk, rice, and renewable energy, confirmed receipt of the proposal and is currently reviewing it with financial and legal advisors.
The post Tether Seeks Majority Stake in South American Agribusiness Adecoagro appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tether-seeks-majority-stake-in-south-american-agribusiness-adecoagro/
